'''Meccha''' was a mid-sized town on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Drall (planet)|Drall]] located near the [[Boiling Sea]].<ref name="TEGtPaM" /> It was made up of domed buildings connected by skywalks. The dome's temperature was kept at 17° Celsius which was chilly to most species, but comfortable to the [[Drall/Legends|Drall]]. The population consisted mainly of farmers who would work at night in the fields outside of the domes and rest inside during the harsh days. In addition to food, some of the farm products were used for medicinal purposes such as the [[Vitapill]]. To the north of the town was an artificial plateau that was used by the Drallish [[Wingriders]] to rest and resupply.<ref>[[Coruscant and the Core Worlds]]</ref>  During the early [[Yuuzhan Vong War]] it was the site of large-scale rioting after the [[New Republic Advisory Council]] voted to redirect a fleet from the defense of the [[Corellian system/Legends|Corellian system]] to [[Bothawui/Legends|Bothawui]].
